name: lyric-skills
description: A focused plugin for turning requirements into markdown solution documents.

interface.shortDescription: Turn requirements into structured markdown solution documents.
interface.longDescription: A local marketplace-style plugin focused on one workflow: reading requirements, turning them into an actionable plan, and writing the result as a markdown document.
defaultPrompt: Read this requirement and turn it into a technical solution document.
Draft an implementation plan from this feature request and save it as markdown.
Organize this rough需求 into a structured md proposal with risks and milestones.
